meta.disclaimer: Indicative ordering and job impacts for presentation only.

interventions.title: Municipal youth reskilling hubs (services & logistics roles)
interventions.description: Target informal workers in high-exposure service clusters with certifiable short courses.

interventions.title: Firm co-investment voucher for process automation with worker retention
interventions.description: Pair automation grants with a requirement to train retained staff for adjacent tasks.

interventions.title: MSME data literacy & micro-app adoption program
interventions.description: Reduce displacement shock by making informal enterprises easier to support digitally.

interventions.title: Regional industry-academy cohorts in manufacturing & textiles
interventions.description: Place-based training aligned to supplier clusters; prioritize commutable districts.

interventions.title: Rural-urban linkages for e-commerce and cold-chain work
interventions.description: Pathways for young workers in informal agriculture and distribution edges.

interventions.title: Cooperative training for agriculture mechanization with retention targets
interventions.description: Blend on-farm safety and repair skills to reduce unplanned job loss to automation.

interventions.title: Port and logistics reskilling with SME pairing
interventions.description: Focus on medium-risk informal roles near shipping and warehousing corridors.

interventions.title: Tourism demand smoothing & service digitization for youth workers
interventions.description: Reduce vulnerability of informal hospitality and transport roles through certifiable skills.

interventions.title: Plantation transition program for climate-smart and higher-skill work
interventions.description: Pair climate adaptation with retraining for adjacent formalizable tasks.

interventions.title: City-centered apprenticeship expansion for informal trade
interventions.titleLocal: Perluasan magang perdagangan informal berbasis kota
interventions.description: Uses anchor employers to create structured on-ramps from informal to formal roles.

interventions.title: Resource-sector skills diversification for adjacent green jobs
interventions.titleLocal: Diversifikasi skill sektor sumber daya (pekerjaan hijau sekitar)
interventions.description: Transition informal workers in extraction-adjacent services toward service maintenance roles.

interventions.title: Community service delivery and connectivity expansion
interventions.description: Strengthen public-service digital adoption while training youth facilitators.
